findings.title: Over Capacity Risk
findings.why: The worst-case ceiling of confirmed guests exceeds the venue's capacity, creating potential issues at the event.
findings.do: Consider revising the guest list or ensure all RSVPs are chased to ascertain a more accurate headcount.

findings.title: Multiple Data Errors Found
findings.why: Inconsistent RSVP and attendee count data found, leading to inaccurate predictions of attendees.
findings.do: Correct the errors in RSVP information and chase overdue RSVPs.

findings.title: Overdue RSVPs and Unconfirmed Plus-Ones
findings.why: Several guests have not confirmed their attendance, and unconfirmed plus-one names contribute to uncertainty.
findings.do: Chase households with pending RSVP status and confirm potential plus-ones.
